description: Constrained linear composite G = wB*B + wP*P + wX*X + wV*V + wR*(100-R). Positive weights sum to 1.0. Calibrate via jobs/calibrate_composite_weights.py.

global_default.rationale: Brand/social drives deal discovery; Proof drives performance premium; Proximity sets market ceiling; Velocity captures momentum pricing; Risk applies availability discount.

cfb.rationale: CFB NIL is reach- and market-heavy; transfer/injury risk moderate vs pro.

ncaab_mens.rationale: March momentum + proof (tournament) spike; moderate NIL vs CFB.

ncaab_womens.rationale: Growing social reach; proof from tournament visibility.

ncaa_volleyball.rationale: Social-heavy women's sport; AVCA proof signal.

nfl.rationale: Proof/EPA + contract proximity; brand from national reach.

nba.rationale: Global brand + stat proof; endorsement market mature.

wnba.rationale: Brand + proof balanced; smaller market vs NBA.
